title: Overview — 5 Concepts
description: Thumbnail grid comparing all five design directions at a glance.

title: Concept 1 — Command Center
description: Dark, dense layout with rotating KPI carousel and four quadrant panels.

title: Concept 2 — Focus Mode
description: Minimal white layout with one hero stat and a prioritized action queue.

title: Concept 3 — Wedge Hub
description: Five tabbed pillars each a self-contained mini-dashboard with status dots.

title: Concept 4 — Narrative Scroll
description: Tall scrollable layout with sticky section anchors telling the compliance story.

title: Concept 5 — Kanban Board
description: Swimlane columns with expandable item cards and badge counts.

title: Which Direction?
description: Comparison rubric — pick a direction before prototyping begins.
